queryStrategy: search relevant HN discussions on conversation intelligence, customer service AI, personalized prompts

queries.query: conversation intelligence platform Gong Chorus customer service

results.title: Show HN: We built our own Gong.io alternative — what we learned

topComments.author: callsign
topComments.snippet: The real value isn't transcription — it's turning conversations into structured insights that can drive coaching. Most teams misunderstand this and just buy a fancy recorder.

topComments.author: hr_throwaway
topComments.snippet: We tried Gong for 6 months. The 'AI insights' were 60% noise, 40% useful. The win came from forcing reps to actually log call outcomes.

results.relevanceToProduct: 证明对话智能产品的核心价值不在转写，在结构化洞察+行动闭环；与本产品F4画像+F5个性化Prompt定位高度契合

results.title: Ask HN: How do you personalize an LLM-based customer service agent?

topComments.author: ml_practitioner
topComments.snippet: Per-user system prompts work surprisingly well. We have ~3000 'VIP' users with custom prompts generated from their history, and CSAT lifted 14%.

topComments.author: ai_skeptic
topComments.snippet: Generating custom prompts for every user is overkill. Cluster users into 5-7 personas first, way cheaper to maintain.

results.relevanceToProduct: VIP用户per-user prompt提升CSAT 14%——与本产品的高净值用户场景高度对齐，置信度+15%；但有声音认为应先聚类（这是Stage 02 PRD要权衡的）

queries.query: Chinese fintech AI customer service Du Xiaoman 360 finance

results.title: Inside Chinese fintech AI: a peek at Du Xiaoman, Ant, Tencent

topComments.author: fintech_zh
topComments.snippet: Du Xiaoman has '小满智客' — its in-house customer service AI platform built on a fine-tuned Llama variant. Internal teams claim 78% intent recognition accuracy.

topComments.author: hkfintech
topComments.snippet: All Chinese consumer-finance companies are required to use domestically-trained LLMs for customer-facing conversations after CAC's 2024 generative AI guidance. No OpenAI/Anthropic in production.

results.relevanceToProduct: 🔥 高价值情报：度小满已有内部AI平台「小满智客」，意图识别78%（与本产品F3目标85%可比）；CAC 2024生成式AI指导意见明确禁止外部LLM——李航的合规担忧得到验证

dataGaps: 无法获取小满智客详细API规范（需走度小满内部渠道）
